name: Bro. Micheal Adeyemo
biography: President of the Life Way Baptist Student Fellowship (LWBSF). Dedicated to leading students into deep vertical alignment and kingdom leadership.

name: Rev'd Ben Banjoko
biography: Seasoned Baptist minister and theologian committed to preaching the Word of God with clarity and power, focusing on spiritual growth and transformation.

name: Sis Mercy Ojo
biography: Student leader and intercessor passionate about campus revival, prayer coordinates, and fostering spiritual growth.

name: Rev'd Adebisi Ikotun
biography: Anointed minister of the gospel and teacher, with a specific focus on awakening leaders to the current move of God and ministerial excellence.

name: Rev'd Alade James
biography: Esteemed pastor and BSF alumnus dedicated to rebuilding broken walls and mentoring students in Baptist heritage and active service.

name: Rev'd Victor Kolawole
biography: Dynamic evangelist and preacher, fanning the revival flame and leading congregations into experiential encounters with the anointing of the Holy Spirit.

name: Pastor Odunayo Adeyemi
biography: Passionate teacher and worship leader focused on dynamic intercession and setting a foundation of pure devotion among leaders and delegates.

name: Bro Bobola Adeyemi
biography: President of the Lead City Baptist Student Fellowship (LCBSF). Committed to mobilizing students for active academic and spiritual service.

name: Rev'd Dr. Julius Oluwole
biography: Doctor of divinity, respected biblical scholar, and keynote speaker focusing on righteousness and structural spiritual alignment.

name: Pst. Mrs Busola Oguntola
biography: Preacher and devotional speaker with a heart for student ministry, alignment, and raising dedicated vessels of honor.

name: Rev'd Dr. Enoch Abimbola
biography: Keynote speaker, author, and theological educator with decades of ministry experience guiding the next generation to accomplish greater works.

name: Prof. Yinka Aladesida
biography: Professor of sciences, BSF patron, and mentor. Passionate about raising kingdom influencers who excel in academics and secular careers.

name: Dr. (Mrs) Mary Akinrinola
biography: Researcher, career mentor, and panelist dedicated to equipping student delegates with career strategies built on a foundation of faith.

name: Dr. (Mrs) Ruth Lawal
biography: Senior lecturer, counselor, and speaker advising student delegates on integrity, professional excellence, and academic balance.

name: Rev'd Ebenezer Osundele
biography: Preacher of the gospel known for leading powerful revival sessions and bringing delegates into deep communion with the Holy Spirit.

name: Bro Mayowa Oshunfuyi
biography: President of the Life Eternal Baptist Student Fellowship (LEBSF). Dedicated to student coordination and spiritual leadership.

name: Mrs Victoria Olaogun
biography: Experienced relationship counselor and speaker committed to helping youths maintain purity and consecration in their relationships.

name: Rev. Tunde Babatunde
biography: Distinguished Baptist leader, minister, and anniversary coordinator overseeing BSF's 40th anniversary milestones.

name: Alumni President
biography: President of the Baptist Student Fellowship Alumni Association. Guiding alumni in supporting current students and honoring BSF's heritage.
